reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(6)(ii) focuses on response and reporting, which aligns with Kubernetes' capabilities for audit logging and monitoring. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture detailed information about API requests, which supports incident response and reporting. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to enforce policies that prevent unauthorized changes, aiding in proactive incident management.
title: 164_308_a_6_ii: 164.308(a)(6)(ii) Response and reporting
